sizing_rule.note: Risk maximum 5% per trade (max_loss_per_trade_percent). The rule emphasizes protective stops at entry (volatility, MAE, channel-based) rather than periodic reassessment, implying fixed fractional sizing with strict per-trade risk limits. The 8% MAE stop indicates a reasonable stop placement for sizing calibration.

source_rule_text: A trader should establish multiple protective stop mechanisms at entry—such as volatility stops, MAE stops, or channel-based stops—rather than relying on periodic portfolio reassessment alone, to avoid serious drawdowns in volatile or illiquid positions.
